parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.id AS session_id,
  s.scheduled_at,
  s.type AS session_type,
  c.id AS contact_id,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.email
FROM sessions s
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = s.contact_id
WHERE s.tenant_id = 1
  AND s.coach_id = 1
  AND s.status = 'completed'
  AND (s.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date = (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date

INSERT INTO interactions (tenant_id, contact_id, session_id, direction, channel, subject, body, workflow_id)
VALUES (1, {{ $('Build Thank You Email').item.json.contact_id }}, {{ $('Build Thank You Email').item.json.session_id }}, 'outbound', 'email', 'Post-Session Thank You', 'Automated post-session thank you email sent', 'WF5')
